text:
=rotate($name, $from, $to, $delay, $duration)
    transform-origin: center
    +keyframes($name, transform, rotateZ($from), rotateZ($to))
    transform: rotateZ($from)
    animation: $name $duration linear forwards infinite
    animation-delay: $delay

=loader
  animation: spinAround 500ms infinite linear
  border: 2px solid $grey-lighter
  border-radius: $radius-rounded
  border-right-color: transparent
  border-top-color: transparent
  content: ""
  display: block
  height: 1em
  position: relative
  width: 1em

=grid-span($span, $location: $grid-counter, $columns: $columns, $gutter: $gutter)
  float: left
  width: grid-span($span, $location, $columns, $gutter)
  $grid-counter: $location + $span
  @if $grid-counter > column-count($columns)
    $grid-counter: 1
  @else
    margin-right: $gutter

=loader
  animation: spin-around 500ms infinite linear
  border: 2px solid $border
  border-radius: 290486px
  border-right-color: transparent
  border-top-color: transparent
  content: ""
  display: block
  height: 16px
  position: relative
  width: 16px

=replace($background, $width, $height)
  background-color: $background
  background-position: center center
  background-repeat: no-repeat
  background-size: $width $height
  display: block
  height: $height
  outline: none
  overflow: hidden
  text-indent: -290486px
  width: $width

=loader
  animation: spinAround 500ms infinite linear
  border: 2px solid $border
  border-radius: $radius-rounded
  border-right-color: transparent
  border-top-color: transparent
  content: ""
  display: block
  height: 1em
  position: relative
  width: 1em

=loader
  animation: spinAround 500ms infinite linear
  border: 2px solid $border
  border-radius: 290486px
  border-right-color: transparent
  border-top-color: transparent
  content: ""
  display: block
  height: 16px
  position: relative
  width: 16px

=animation($nameAnimation, $durationAnimation, $functionAnimation, $delayAnimation, $repeatAnimation, $directionAnimation, $stateAnimation)
  animation-name: $nameAnimation
  animation-duration: $durationAnimation
  animation-play-state: $stateAnimation
  animation-delay: $delayAnimation
  animation-iteration-count: $repeatAnimation
  animation-direction: $directionAnimation
  animation-timing-function: $functionAnimation

=hide-text($direction: $hide-text-direction)
  @if $direction == left
    $approximate-em-value: 12px
    $wider-than-any-screen: -9999
    text-indent: $wider-than-any-screen * $approximate-em-value
    overflow: hidden
    text-align: left
  @else
    // slightly wider than the box prevents issues with inline-block elements
    text-indent: 110%
    white-space: nowrap
    overflow: hidden

#toggleNavbar
  +position(fixed, -999999px -999999px null null)

  &:checked
    ~ .navbar
      display: table

    ~ .logo a,
    ~ .logo span
      color: #fff

    ~ .toggle-navbar-button
      .icon-menu
        display: none
      .icon-cross
        display: block
